Bash(aws rds-data execute-statement --resource-arn "$DB_CLUSTER_ARN" --secret-arn "$DB_SECRET_ARN" --database "$DB_NAME" --region us-west-2 --sql "SELECT CASE WHEN stars < 3.0 THEN ''below 3.0'' WHEN stars < 3.5 THEN ''3.0-3.4'' WHEN stars < 4.0 THEN ''3.5-3.9'' WHEN stars < 4.5 THEN ''4.0-4.4'' ELSE ''4.5+'' END as bracket, COUNT\(*\) FROM blaize_bazaar.product_catalog GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1" --output json)
